message:
fix(ci): add bd skip check to benchmark_datasets tests

- Add skip_if_no_bd!() to benchmark_datasets.rs tests
- Bump version to 0.1.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.2"
+version = "0.1.3"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.85"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
